reasoning_content:
Wait, the score is 42.47, but the grep shows that all tests are 100.00? Let me re-check. There are two possibilities:
1. The score report only counts some test cases (some are excluded from TASK3_EXCLUDE_REGEX)
2. The weights are different

Let me check which cases are actually included and scored.

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && grep -E "0\.00|100\.00" build/test/task3/score.txt | wc -l && echo "---total cases---" && grep -c "/100" build/test/task3/score.txt && echo "---0 score---" && grep "0\.00" build/test/task3/score.txt | head -20

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"summary": "Check which cases are in task3 score", "command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && grep -E \"0\\.00|100\\.00\" build/test/task3/score.txt | wc -l && echo \"---total cases---\" && grep -c \"/100\" build/test/task3/score.txt && echo \"---0 score---\" && grep \"0\\.00\" build/test/task3/score.txt | head -20"}

summary: Check which cases are in task3 score
